title: SAVING GRACE MATERNITY HOME - 211info
text: SAVING GRACE MATERNITY HOME SAVING GRACE MATERNITY HOME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith-based maternity home. Women and their babies may stay in the program up to a year after the child is born, if working towards independence (school or job for at least 20 hours per week, doing chores). Eligibility: Pregnant women or parenting a child under the age of 1, between the ages of 18-25. Hours: Maternity home: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 415-7763 - . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 415-7763 Main phone Main phone (971) 415-7763 Jennifer Karp-sizemore [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: $200 per month after receiving TANF. All monies are put aside for the resident and returned at the time of departure. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of pregnancy AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday - Friday 8am - 5pm Services: Maternity Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
